# Role: CUSTOMER_AND_FAMILY_VENDOR

## Purpose

Represents buying customers and family vendors listing products under approved categories.

## Capabilities

- Browse, search, filter, and purchase products
- Manage profile, cart, and order history
- Create vendor product listings if granted by admin workflow

## Product Scope For Vendor Listings

- Electronics
- Furniture
- Books
- Clothing (men, women, kids)
- Footwear (shoes, slippers, sandals)
- Home gadgets

## Rules

- Listing quality checks should be enforced server-side
- Category metadata should be normalized to avoid duplicate category names
- Pricing and stock updates must be validated
